task_completion.description: Verify that the Capital Accounts module is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Capital Accounts' visible in the left-hand navigation menu of the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that a capital account for Maria Chen has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Maria Chen' listed in the Capital Accounts tab or on the Summary screen under Capital Accounts.

task_completion.description: Verify that a capital account for David Chen has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'David Chen' listed in the Capital Accounts tab or on the Summary screen under Capital Accounts.

task_completion.description: Verify that a receipt of $50,000.00 was recorded for Maria Chen into the Cash on Hand bank account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a receipt transaction of 50,000.00 deposited into 'Cash on Hand' and allocated to 'Capital Accounts' -> 'Maria Chen'. This can be seen in the Receipts tab, Bank Transactions, or the Capital Accounts summary.

task_completion.description: Verify that a receipt of $75,000.00 was recorded for David Chen into the Cash on Hand bank account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a receipt transaction of 75,000.00 deposited into 'Cash on Hand' and allocated to 'Capital Accounts' -> 'David Chen'. This can be seen in the Receipts tab, Bank Transactions, or the Capital Accounts summary.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Manager.io web interface or desktop application being used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually entered the data into the Manager.io forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Manager.io forms (like New Receipt or New Capital Account) being filled out or the resulting summary screens, not a text editor or mocked UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a terminal or script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no open terminal windows or code editors executing scripts to interact with the Manager.io backend/API.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target module: 'Capital Accounts'. Target bank account: 'Cash on Hand'. Expected partners and contributions: 'Maria Chen' ($50,000.00) and 'David Chen' ($75,000.00).
